summary: Replayed ADR 0245 from the exact committed 0.177.64 mainline candidate by converging the shared API gateway and interactive ops portal on docker-runtime-lv3, publishing the declared-to-live service attestation contract through the authenticated gateway surfaces, and re-verifying both the internal portal runtime and the public edges while preserving the current mainline platform baseline.

verification.observed: uv run --with pytest --with fastapi==0.116.1 --with httpx==0.28.1 --with uvicorn==0.35.0 --with pyyaml==6.0.2 --with cryptography==45.0.6 --with jinja2==3.1.5 --with itsdangerous==2.2.0 --with python-multipart==0.0.20 pytest -q tests/test_declared_live_attestation.py tests/test_api_gateway.py tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py returned 39 passed in 11.10s, python3 -m py_compile platform/runtime_assurance/declared_live_attestation.py scripts/declared_live_attestation.py scripts/api_gateway/main.py scripts/ops_portal/app.py scripts/ops_portal/runtime_assurance.py passed, and make syntax-check-api-gateway plus make syntax-check-ops-portal both passed.

make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-api-gateway and make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-ops-portal passed from the isolated worktree, ./scripts/validate_repo.sh shell passed after the SC2295 fix in scripts/validate_repo.sh, and ./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards plus uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate were rerun successfully after this receipt landed.

make converge-api-gateway env=production ANSIBLE_TRACE_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true' completed successfully from source commit 0fc12d6caebe09b797bfafd85b5b3cbf71fe3e74 with recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=242 changed=111 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=35 rescued=0 ignored=0.

make converge-ops-portal env=production ANSIBLE_TRACE_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true' completed successfully from source commit 0fc12d6caebe09b797bfafd85b5b3cbf71fe3e74 with recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=126 changed=18 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=13 rescued=0 ignored=0.

HEAD https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/attestation returned HTTP/2 401 without a bearer token, GET https://api.lv3.org/healthz returned HTTP/2 200 with {"status":"ok"}, authenticated GET https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/attestation returned HTTP/2 200 with a 44-service production summary, and authenticated GET https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/attestation/api_gateway returned HTTP/2 200 with service_id=api_gateway and status=attested.

verification.check: Ops portal internal and public verification
verification.observed: From docker-runtime-lv3 reached through the current Proxmox jump path, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/health returned HTTP/1.1 200 with {"status":"ok"}, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/ returned HTTP/1.1 200 and still contained Runtime Assurance, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/overview returned HTTP/1.1 200 and still contained Runtime Assurance, GET https://ops.lv3.org/health returned HTTP/2 200 with {"status":"ok"}, and HEAD https://ops.lv3.org/ returned HTTP/2 302 redirecting to /oauth2/sign_in as expected for the protected operator shell.

notes: This exact-main receipt is the first canonical live-apply evidence for ADR 0245 and records the replay from the committed 0.177.64 candidate rather than the earlier branch-local verification passes.
The verified mainline platform baseline remained 0.130.45 during this replay; the release cut records ADR 0245 in repo truth without claiming a new platform version bump.
The ops-portal recovery runbook was updated in the same branch because the older hardcoded Proxmox jump address no longer matched the live management path discovered during verification.
